description: Lane 1 weak on exhibition, lane 2 strong on exhibition and ST edge. Buy 2-1, 2-3, 2-4.

Exactly two A1s with lane 1 as A1 and another A1 in lane 2 or 3, lane 4 not too strong. Buy 1-2-3, 1-3-2, 1-2-4.

Lane 5 low prior rank but best exhibition, lane 4 delayed on ST. Buy 5-1-2, 5-1-6.
